title: FAQ
subtitle: Things I get asked a lot

questions.label: What services do you provide?
questions.content: I mainly offer web and mobile development services, in addition to digital design and consulting. My goal is to help you build high-quality products that meet your needs and the needs of your users.

questions.label: Can you redesign an existing website?
questions.content: Absolutely, I can analyze your current website and either completely redesign it or partially improve its user experience, performance, and overall look.

questions.label: Do you work on small projects?
questions.content: Yes, I take on small and medium-sized projects, as long as the project requirements are clear and can be executed with high quality.

questions.label: How much does a project cost?
questions.content: The cost of a project depends on several factors, such as the scale of the project, its features, development time, and others.

questions.label: How does payment work for a project?
questions.content: I require a 40% upfront deposit before starting the project, and the remaining 60% after successful delivery. I accept payments via bank transfer, PayPal, etc.

questions.label: How long does a project take?
questions.content: It's difficult to give an exact estimate because every project is different, but the majority of my past work has taken between two weeks and two months.

questions.label: Are there any hidden or additional fees?
questions.content: Any additional costs (such as hosting, domains, or third-party services) are strictly clarified upfront before starting the project.

questions.label: Do you offer discounts?
questions.content: I offer a 15% discount for students and non-profit organizations.

questions.label: What do you enjoy most about this work?
questions.content: I love learning new things and the ability to create almost anything from scratch, making beautiful things that people use and enjoy.

questions.label: How do you continuously develop your skills?
questions.content: I make sure to stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and design trends, applying them practically in real projects to ensure I deliver top-tier quality.

questions.label: What sets you apart from others?
questions.content: A strong focus on details, blending both design and development, and caring about user experience practically rather than just theoretically.

questions.label: How do you handle work pressure?
questions.content: I rely on time management and prioritizing tasks, maintaining high-quality work without compromising deadlines.
